conditions: No secrets may be exposed in logs, docs, evidence, approval records, or launch records.
Release/deploy commands require final explicit execution confirmation after Phase364.
Rollback plan must remain available during launch window.
Monitoring activation must be dry-run verified before execution.
Billing remains estimate-only unless separate real billing approval is issued.
Non-NVIDIA provider calls remain gated by credentialRef, credential vault, user-owned provider policy, selectable gate, quota, and budget controls.
